basic_details.job_title: District Education Office Sukma Competitive Exam Trainer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: District Education Office Sukma Competitive Exam Trainer Notification 2026 has been released on 30 May 2026 on the official website www.sukma.gov.in. A total of 6 vacancies have been announced through the District Education Office Sukma Competitive Exam Trainer Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 21 years Maximum Age: 45 years Age relaxation will be provided as per Chhattisgarh State Government rules for various categories.

qualification.education_qualification: Graduate degree, Complete knowledge of all subjects, General Knowledge, Banking, Commerce, Economics and Computer knowledge, Preference to UPSC/PSC Preliminary and Main Examination cleared candidates
qualification.details: Graduate degree with complete knowledge of all subjects, General Knowledge, Banking, Commerce, Economics and Computer. Preference to candidates who have cleared UPSC/PSC Preliminary and Main Examination.

vacancy_details.Post Name: Trainer for PSC/Vyapam/Banking/Railway/Other Competitive Exams (All Subjects)

selection_process: Merit list based on 60% weightage on educational qualification marks and 40% on interview Document Verification
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for District Education Office Sukma Competitive Exam Trainer Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.sukma.gov.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 05-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the District Education Office Sukma Competitive Exam Trainer recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the offline application form for the District Education Office Sukma Competitive Exam Trainer recruitment is 05-06-2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Competitive Exam Trainer post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 6 vacancies available for the Competitive Exam Trainer post in the District Education Office Sukma.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Competitive Exam Trainer post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Graduate degree with complete knowledge of all subjects, General Knowledge, Banking, Commerce, Economics, and Computer knowledge. Preference will be given to those who have cleared UPSC/PSC Preliminary and Main Examinations.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the Competitive Exam Trainer position?
faq.answer: The minimum age limit is 21 years and the maximum age limit is 45 years. Age relaxation is applicable as per Chhattisgarh State Government rules.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Competitive Exam Trainer post?
faq.answer: The selected candidates will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 6000 per month, which is negotiable.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is offline. Candidates need to download the application form and submit it via post.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for the District Education Office Sukma recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q8. How will candidates be selected for the Competitive Exam Trainer post?
faq.answer: The selection process involves a merit list based on 60% weightage of educational qualification marks and 40% weightage of interview marks, followed by document verification.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I download the application form?
faq.answer: The application form can be downloaded from the official website of the District Education Office Sukma, which is www.sukma.gov.in.

faq.question: Q10. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this recruitment is 510 / जि.शि.अ. / सक्षम कोचिंग / 2026-27.
